NVDA.name: NVIDIA Corporation
NVDA.ai_strategy_one_line_zh: 以GPU与CUDA为核心，构建数据中心级AI基础设施平台，覆盖训练、推理与企业级AI应用。
NVDA.ai_strategy_one_line_en: Builds data-center-scale AI infrastructure and full-stack platform to power training, inference, and enterprise AI applications.

MSFT.name: Microsoft Corporation
MSFT.ai_strategy_one_line_zh: 以云+智能平台为底座，面向企业提供安全负责的AI与Copilot应用。
MSFT.ai_strategy_one_line_en: Build an enterprise AI platform across cloud, security, and Copilot-driven productivity.
concrete_bets: Integrated security, compliance, identity, and privacy AI

PLTR.name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
PLTR.ai_strategy_one_line_zh: 以AIP把大模型接入Gotham/Foundry，赋能政府与企业的决策自动化。
PLTR.ai_strategy_one_line_en: Builds an enterprise AI platform that embeds LLMs into Gotham and Foundry for decision-making across government and commercial workflows.
concrete_bets: Open-source, self-hosted, and commercial LLM integration

META.name: Meta Platforms, Inc.
META.ai_strategy_one_line_zh: 以Meta AI驱动社交应用、内容推荐与AI眼镜等多终端体验，推进多模态AI和下一代计算平台。
META.ai_strategy_one_line_en: Embed Meta AI across apps, glasses, and discovery systems to create multimodal consumer experiences and next-gen computing.
concrete_bets: AI-powered content ranking and discovery engine
AI glasses and long-term AR hardware

themes.evidence_one_line_zh: 围绕Codex、OpenAI企业编码代理和个人AI工作流，核心都是把AI用作高效研发搭子。
themes.evidence_one_line_en: Posts on Codex, enterprise coding agents, and AI work workflows.

themes.evidence_one_line_zh: 集中讨论更快、更长上下文、更并行的推理与注意力/架构优化。
themes.evidence_one_line_en: Efficiency-focused model architectures and inference-speed improvements.

themes.evidence_one_line_zh: 这些文章都在做模型/系统的对比、评估、研究辅助或行为理解。
themes.evidence_one_line_en: Evaluation, benchmarking, and understanding model behavior at scale.

themes.evidence_one_line_zh: 覆盖医疗、教育、OCR、地球观测、内容溯源与创意生成等真实场景。
themes.evidence_one_line_en: Real-world deployments across healthcare, education, OCR, provenance, and science.

themes.evidence_one_line_zh: 以Datasette发布、网页细节、硬件价格和监管新闻为主，属于本期AI周边生态。
themes.evidence_one_line_en: Developer tools, web details, hardware market news, and adjacent ecosystem items.
